untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of current candle range to the 22-day average range (not including current candle), then multiply by 146%. The allowed indicators do not include a pre-calculated 22-day average range metric. To properly implement, would need either: (1) a custom indicator like avg_range_22_excl_current, or (2) ability to compute sma(range, 22) excluding the current bar. Additionally, the signal requires checking if current candle is above the highs of 2 and 3 days prior (or below lows for shorts), which requires prev_high[2] and prev_high[3] indexing not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using range as a proxy for candle height, but cannot accurately implement the 22-day historical average exclusion logic or multi-bar lookback required. Signal is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT (bullish above prior highs, bearish below prior lows). Exit conditions marked as reversal based on 67-72% success rate indicating mean reversion within 1 day. Stop loss and target price computation marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source, so set to null.
